About Me

Passion-driven Engineer

Nabanna Choudhury is a Computer Engineering student at Assam Downtown University, driven by a deep passion for innovation and continuous learning. With a strong foundation in web development and creative expertise in photo and video editing, he strives to build unique and meaningful digital experiences.

Known for a focused, curious, and disciplined mindset, he consistently seeks opportunities to grow and push boundaries. Beyond technology, he holds a diploma in Art by Sarbabharatiya Sangeet O Sanskrt Parishad and enjoys music and cricket — bringing creativity and teamwork into everything he does.

Web Developer

Building responsive interfaces with clean code and strong UX focus.

Creative Designer

Art diploma holder with Adobe tools expertise and design thinking.

Problem Solver

Analytical thinker who approaches every challenge with curiosity.

Innovator

Driven to push boundaries and create meaningful tech-powered impact.
